actions.title: Fix docstring false-positive
actions.change: Rewrote docstring line 7: removed literal 'os.path.exists' — replaced with 'No filesystem path-existence assertions in this module.'

actions.title: Add request_id to logs
actions.change: Added request_id_middleware to FastAPI app: generates UUIDv4 per request, clears+binds to structlog contextvars, sets X-Request-ID response header. logging_config.py already had merge_contextvars in shared_processors — updated module docstring to document the contract.
actions.verification: request_id_middleware present in main.py; merge_contextvars in logging_config.py

actions.title: Add DuckDB retry/backoff
actions.change: Extracted _connect_read_only() and _connect_write() helpers decorated with @retry(stop=stop_after_attempt(3), wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=1, max=10), reraise=True). Both read_conn() and write_conn() use these helpers. tenacity import added.
actions.verification: from tenacity import present; stop_after_attempt(3) present

actions.title: Add Prometheus /metrics endpoint
actions.change: Created geo_service/infra/metrics.py with REQUEST_DURATION Histogram (http_request_duration_seconds, labelled method+endpoint) and metrics_app WSGIMiddleware. Mounted at /metrics in create_app(). REQUEST_DURATION.observe() called inside request_id_middleware with route path and duration.
actions.verification: http_request_duration_seconds in metrics.py; /metrics mount in main.py

actions.title: Write docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
actions.change: Created new file with three sections: (1) Ranked architectural characteristics table (availability > scalability > testability > deployability), (2) Coupling analysis table (8 dependency pairs with contract type), (3) ADR index ADR-001 through ADR-012 with one-line summaries.
